_meta.purpose: Emoji pools for Mixed language reviews. Mixed writers behave like Hinglish writers — expressive but not overdone. Same structure as other emoji files.
rules: Mixed writers use emojis like Hinglish writers — 🙏 is common but not exclusive
English side of brain pulls in ✨ 💯 🔥 — Hinglish/Hindi side pulls in 🙏 ❤️
Combinations feel like WhatsApp messages from educated young Indian adults
Engine controls probability — not this file

combinations._note: Mixed writers blend both styles — some combos are English-flavored, some Hindi-flavored.
